_comment: THE BOX for mars-greenhouse-ops. Tools span themed MCP servers (sensors, irrigation, power, kb, notify, harvest, climate, lighting, nutrients, crops, pests, seeds). Hero tools have rich descriptions + additional_search_text and live in hero_tools/. sensors.read_air is PINNED to show the pin feature. The rest are name+description only so the box is honestly large.

tools.name: sensors.read_air
tools.description: Read the dome's current CO2, oxygen, and humidity for the growing area; use when someone asks how the air is, whether the plants have enough CO2, if it's too humid, or if the greenhouse atmosphere looks healthy.
tools.additional_search_text: air quality co2 carbon dioxide oxygen humidity dome atmosphere greenhouse photosynthesis plants stuffy

tools.name: irrigation.schedule
tools.description: Plan and schedule a watering / drip-irrigation cycle for a planting bed; returns water volume, duration, target soil moisture and the next cycle time.
tools.additional_search_text: water watering irrigation drip soak thirsty bed soil moisture schedule cycle hydrate plants tomatoes

tools.name: power.balance_load
tools.description: Rebalance the greenhouse power budget across grow-lights, fans and pumps when solar/battery draw is tight; dims non-critical loads while protecting the grow-lights.
tools.additional_search_text: electrical power budget battery solar grow lights load shed amps watts draw distribute energy panels

tools.name: kb.search_guides
tools.description: Search the planting and plant-care guide library; use for any how-do-I-grow-X, how-deep-to-sow, spacing, or care-tips request.
tools.additional_search_text: guide how to grow planting care sow seed depth spacing germination tips manual handbook basil tomato lettuce

tools.name: notify.crew
tools.description: Post a friendly status note or harvest update to the colony crew board (the rest of the Mars team).
tools.additional_search_text: message crew colony team notify post board tell everyone share update announce gardener status note

tools.name: harvest.log
tools.description: Look up the harvest log: what was picked, how much, and which bed it came from for a given crop or day.

tools.name: sensors.read_soil
tools.description: Read soil moisture for a planting bed.

tools.name: sensors.read_light
tools.description: Read PAR (photosynthetic light) levels in the dome.

tools.name: climate.set_temp
tools.description: Set the dome temperature setpoint.

tools.name: climate.read_humidity
tools.description: Read the current dome humidity.

tools.name: lighting.set_schedule
tools.description: Set the grow-light photoperiod schedule.

tools.name: lighting.read_par
tools.description: Read current grow-light PAR output.

tools.name: irrigation.read_flow
tools.description: Read the irrigation water flow rate.

tools.name: irrigation.purge_line
tools.description: Purge a clogged drip line.

tools.name: power.read_battery
tools.description: Read battery state of charge.

tools.name: power.read_solar
tools.description: Read solar array output.

tools.name: nutrients.dose
tools.description: Dose hydroponic nutrient solution into a reservoir.

tools.name: nutrients.read_ph
tools.description: Read the nutrient reservoir pH.

tools.name: harvest.schedule_task
tools.description: Schedule a harvesting task on the crew timeline.

tools.name: crops.read_growth
tools.description: Read the growth stage of a crop bed.

tools.name: pests.scan
tools.description: Scan a bed for pests or disease.

tools.name: pests.treat
tools.description: Apply biocontrol treatment to a bed.

tools.name: kb.search_pests
tools.description: Search the pest and plant-disease database.

tools.name: seeds.plant
tools.description: Start a new seed tray for germination.

tools.name: seeds.read_inventory
tools.description: Read the seed bank inventory.

tools.name: climate.read_temp
tools.description: Read the current dome temperature.

tools.name: climate.vent
tools.description: Open dome vents to shed heat or humidity.

tools.name: power.forecast
tools.description: Forecast solar production for the next 24 hours.

tools.name: notify.mission_control
tools.description: Send a status ping to Earth mission control.

tools.name: kb.search_nutrients
tools.description: Search the hydroponic nutrient reference.

tools.name: harvest.read_yield
tools.description: Read cumulative yield for a crop this cycle.

tools.name: crops.rotate_bed
tools.description: Rotate a bed to the next crop in the plan.
